sections.paragraph:
Original: רצץ

Transliteration: râtsats

Phonetic: raw-tsats'

BDB Definition:

  1. to crush, oppress
    1. (Qal)
      1. to crush, get crushed, be crushed
      2. to crush, oppress (figuratively)
      3. crushed (participle passive)
    2. (Niphal) to be crushed, be broken
    3. (Piel)
      1. to crush in pieces
      2. to grievously oppress (figuratively)
    4. (Poel) to oppress (figuratively)
    5. (Hiphil) to crush
    6. (Hithpoel) to crush each other

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 2212

Part(s) of speech: Verb
